cube.description: Text-to-image generation for Anima: prompts, model loading, prompt scheduling, LoRA scheduling, sampling, and VAE decoding.

cube.description: Diffusion upscaling for Anima: upscale an input image, then refine it with tiled diffusion to avoid running Anima diffusion outside its supported resolutions.

catalog_entry.description: Diffusion upscaling for Anima: upscale an input image, then refine it with tiled diffusion to avoid running Anima diffusion outside its supported resolutions.

cube_buffer.description: Diffusion upscaling for Anima: upscale an input image, then refine it with tiled diffusion to avoid running Anima diffusion outside its supported resolutions.

cube.description: Prompt-guided detailing for Anima: create masks with GroundingDINO, SAM, and ViTMatte, then upscale and refine selected regions with tiled diffusion.

SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiled.name: SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiledDiffusion

SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiled.display_name: Detail SEGS by Scale Factor w/ Tiled Diffusion
SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiled.name: SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiledDiffusion

SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiled.description: Details scaled SEGS crops with tiled diffusion sampling.
SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiled.display_name: Detail SEGS by Scale Factor w/ Tiled Diffusion

cfg.tooltip: Prompt guidance strength. Higher values follow the positive prompt more strongly but can look overcooked.

clamp_size.tooltip: Maximum crop size in pixels after scaling. Use 0 to leave crop size unclamped.

denoise.tooltip: Sampling strength. Lower values preserve the input more; higher values allow larger changes.

diffusion_mode.tooltip: Tiled sampling blend method. MultiDiffusion is steady; Mixture of Diffusers can blend tile predictions more softly.

feather.tooltip: Mask edge softness in pixels. Higher values blend edits more gently into the image.

image.tooltip: Source image containing the regions to improve. Detailed crops are blended back into this image.

latent_tile_batch_size.tooltip: Number of latent tiles sampled together. Higher values can be faster but use more memory.

latent_tile_height.tooltip: Height of each latent tile. Larger tiles see more context but use more memory.

latent_tile_overlap.tooltip: Overlap between latent tiles. Larger overlaps reduce seams but increase sampling work.

latent_tile_width.tooltip: Width of each latent tile. Larger tiles see more context but use more memory.

model.tooltip: Diffusion model used to resample each detailed crop.

negative.tooltip: Negative conditioning for detailing. A conditioning batch is matched to SEGS order.

noise_mask.tooltip: Limit sampling noise to the selected mask area so unchanged pixels stay more stable.

noise_mask_feather.tooltip: Noise mask edge softness in pixels. Higher values make the sampled area fade out more gradually.

positive.tooltip: Positive conditioning for detailing. A conditioning batch is matched to SEGS order.

sampler_name.tooltip: Sampling algorithm. It affects the image's look, speed, and stability.

scale_factor.tooltip: Crop enlargement multiplier. Larger values give the sampler more detail room but use more memory.

scheduler.tooltip: Noise schedule used during sampling. It changes how quickly structure and detail form.

seed.tooltip: Seed used to create sampling noise. Reusing it with matching settings makes results repeatable.

segs.tooltip: SEGS regions that choose which parts of the image are detailed.

steps.tooltip: Number of denoising steps. More steps can add refinement but take longer.

tiled_decode.tooltip: Decode large crops in tiles. This lowers memory use but is usually slower.

tiled_encode.tooltip: Encode large crops in tiles. This lowers memory use but is usually slower.

upscale_method.tooltip: Resize method for scaled crops. Sharper methods preserve detail but can show more ringing.

vae.tooltip: VAE used to encode crops to latents and decode the edited crops.

SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiled.name: SimpleSyrup.DetailSEGSByScaleFactorTiledDiffusion
output_tooltips: Image with the detailed regions blended back into place.

SimpleSyrup.KSamplerTiledDiffusion.description: Denoises latents with selectable tiled diffusion sampling.

cfg.tooltip: Prompt guidance strength. Higher values follow the positive prompt more strongly but can look overcooked.

denoise.tooltip: Sampling strength. Lower values preserve the input more; higher values allow larger changes.

diffusion_mode.tooltip: Tiled sampling blend method. MultiDiffusion is steady; Mixture of Diffusers can blend tile predictions more softly.

latent_image.tooltip: Latent input whose samples will be denoised.

latent_tile_batch_size.tooltip: Number of latent tiles sampled together. Higher values can be faster but use more memory.

latent_tile_height.tooltip: Height of each latent tile. Larger tiles see more context but use more memory.

latent_tile_overlap.tooltip: Overlap between latent tiles. Larger overlaps reduce seams but increase sampling work.

latent_tile_width.tooltip: Width of each latent tile. Larger tiles see more context but use more memory.

model.tooltip: Diffusion model used to denoise the input latent.

negative.tooltip: Negative conditioning that guides what the sampler should avoid.

positive.tooltip: Positive conditioning that guides what the sampler should add.

sampler_name.tooltip: Sampling algorithm. It affects the image's look, speed, and stability.

scheduler.tooltip: Noise schedule used during sampling. It changes how quickly structure and detail form.

seed.tooltip: Seed used to create sampling noise. Reusing it with matching settings makes results repeatable.

steps.tooltip: Number of denoising steps. More steps can add refinement but take longer.

SimpleSyrup.KSamplerTiledDiffusion.name: SimpleSyrup.KSamplerTiledDiffusion
output_tooltips: Denoised latent for VAE decode or more latent processing.

SimpleSyrup.SimpleLoadAnima.description: Loads Anima model components with auto-resolved Qwen assets.

diffusion_model.tooltip: Anima diffusion model file used as the main image generation model.

diffusion_weight_dtype.tooltip: Weight precision for Anima. Lower precision can reduce memory use but may slightly change results.

text_encoder.tooltip: Qwen text encoder used for Anima prompt understanding. Auto selects the expected model.

text_encoder_device.tooltip: Device for the text encoder. Auto follows the normal ComfyUI placement.

vae.tooltip: VAE used to decode Anima latents. Auto selects the expected Qwen image VAE.

SimpleSyrup.SimpleLoadAnima.name: SimpleSyrup.SimpleLoadAnima
output_tooltips: Loaded diffusion model for downstream MODEL inputs.
Loaded text encoder for downstream CLIP inputs.
Loaded VAE used to encode images to latents and decode latents to images.

SimpleSyrup.VAEDecodeOptions.description: Decodes latents to images with selectable normal or tiled VAE execution.

overlap.tooltip: Overlap between tiles in pixels. Larger overlaps reduce seams but do more work.

samples.tooltip: Latent samples to decode into an image.

temporal_overlap.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of overlapping frames between temporal tiles.

temporal_size.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of frames to decode at once.

tile_size.tooltip: Tile size in pixels. Larger tiles are faster but use more memory.

use_tiling.tooltip: Use ComfyUI's tiled VAE node. Disabled uses normal ComfyUI VAE behavior, including its automatic tiled retry after out-of-memory.

vae.tooltip: VAE used for the selected encode or decode operation.

SimpleSyrup.VAEDecodeOptions.name: SimpleSyrup.VAEDecodeOptions
output_tooltips: Image produced by ComfyUI's selected VAE decode node.

SimpleSyrup.VAEEncodeOptions.description: Encodes images to latent space with selectable normal or tiled VAE execution.

overlap.tooltip: Overlap between tiles in pixels. Larger overlaps reduce seams but do more work.

pixels.tooltip: Image to encode into latent space.

temporal_overlap.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of overlapping frames between temporal tiles.

temporal_size.tooltip: For video VAEs, number of frames to encode at once.

tile_size.tooltip: Tile size in pixels. Larger tiles are faster but use more memory.

use_tiling.tooltip: Use ComfyUI's tiled VAE node. Disabled uses normal ComfyUI VAE behavior, including its automatic tiled retry after out-of-memory.

vae.tooltip: VAE used for the selected encode or decode operation.

SimpleSyrup.VAEEncodeOptions.name: SimpleSyrup.VAEEncodeOptions
output_tooltips: Latent produced by ComfyUI's selected VAE encode node.

VAEDecode.description: Decodes latent images back into pixel space images.

vae.tooltip: The VAE model used for decoding the latent.

VAEDecode.name: VAEDecode
